description: account delete command — permanently delete an XRPL account and sweep remaining XRP to a destination

userStories.title: account delete command
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to permanently delete an XRPL account from the CLI so I can close unused accounts and recover their XRP balance.
acceptanceCriteria: Read AccountDelete docs at https://github.com/XRPLF/xrpl-dev-portal/blob/master/docs/references/protocol/transactions/types/accountdelete.md before implementing
Create src/commands/account/delete.ts and register it in src/commands/account/index.ts
xrpl account delete with: --destination <address> (required), --destination-tag <n> (optional), --confirm (required boolean flag)
CLI exits with error if --destination is missing
CLI exits with error if --destination is not a valid classic address
CLI exits with error if --confirm is not provided (message: 'This permanently deletes your account. Pass --confirm to proceed.') — unless --dry-run is set
Help text notes: 'Fee: ~2 XRP (owner reserve, non-refundable)'
tests/e2e/account/account.delete.validation.test.ts: missing destination, invalid destination address, missing --confirm without --dry-run (no network)
tests/e2e/account/account.delete.test.ts: fund a fresh wallet, delete it pointing to another funded wallet, verify account no longer exists via account info; --json, --dry-run
